requirement.clarified: Fix all 7 items from CLOSE: NO close-debate (docs/dev/close-report-20260527-132200.md) — 5 blocking + 2 fix-required (Codex findings table marks AC12 test and AC6 spec drift as 'Fix required'), so the Graphify dual-touchpoint integration (task 20260527-132200) passes /close
requirement.what: 7 targeted fixes: venv activation (4 sites), decimal step prose (3 files), CJK literals (3 locations), nil-map context-file patching, dispatch guard, AC12 test, AC6 spec text
requirement.why: CLOSE: NO was returned because 10 style-inspector critical violations were introduced in the Cycle 1 diff, plus a behavioral gap in graphify-enrich.py and an unconditional dispatch that fails when binary is absent

included: venv activation prefix on all 4 bare python3 invocations (F1)
Replace decimal prose step references with 'between Step N and Step N+1' in 3 files (F2)
Replace CJK literals with Unicode escapes in .py and pointer in .md (F3)

commands/dev.md: guard graphify dispatch on sentinel existence (F5)
Update AC6 WHEN clause in ticket + acceptance-criteria (F7)
excluded: stale graphify-run.json context_patch persistence (Codex minor, no AC)
AC9 update-failure status propagation (advisory system, no AC, no user requirement)
Any changes to infrastructure outside close-blocking fix set

out_of_scope_observations.observation: graphify-run.json is written BEFORE run_manifest artifacts dict is populated, and context_patch update is never persisted back to graphify-run.json. Real consistency issue (Codex BLOCKER 5) but no AC requires graphify-run.json to contain context_patch. Diagnostic artifact only.

Update failure at lines 205-207 is recorded in run_manifest but code continues to extract subgraph; if extraction succeeds, final status can be STATUS_OK even though update failed. Spec says failed=non-zero-exit but advisory system means DEV proceeds regardless. Codex BLOCKER 8: real spec-implementation gap, minor severity.

root_cause_analysis.symptom: CLOSE: NO — 10 style-inspector critical violations introduced in diff, AC8 context-patch gap in nil-map path, AC11/dispatch conflict when binary absent
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The Cycle 1 implementation introduced CJK characters in .md agent/command files and .py scripts, bare python3 calls without venv activation, and decimal step references in prose — all of which are caught by style-inspector on commit. Additionally, the AC8 requirement that 'DEV still receives a valid (empty) graph_context object' was not implemented in the nil-map skip path of graphify-enrich.py (the context-file patching block at line 231 is only reachable after a successful extraction, not in the skipped path). The dispatch guard gap is a separate issue: prompt-workflow.py correctly skips writing graphify.json when binary is absent, but commands/dev.md dispatches the graphify subagent unconditionally at the same dispatch point.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: fe4c7df auto-bulk: end-of-cycle commit for master -- tests/bin (task 20260527-132200) updates (and prior commits 1e559fc, 4e1a9f7, b5d152a, ecf792b)
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: Style violations were not caught by QA because QA verified headings (AC6 recipe) rather than all prose decimal references (Standard 4 scope), and the AC8 test did not invoke with --context-file so the context-patching clause was never verified
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: style-inspector runs on every /close cycle and blocks merge when critical violations are introduced_in_diff; the AC8 gap means DEV does NOT receive graph_context when graphify is skipped due to nil blast-radius-map; the dispatch gap causes subagent FIRST ACTION Read failure when binary absent

development_approach.strategy: Apply 7 targeted surgical fixes to the identified locations. Each fix is a minimal text edit. No architectural change required. Fix order: F1 (venv) -> F2 (decimal prose) -> F3 (CJK) -> F4 (nil-map patch) -> F5 (dispatch guard) -> F6 (AC12 test) -> F7 (AC6 text).
development_approach.validation_approach: QA runs style-inspector on changed files to confirm 0 critical violations; invokes graphify-enrich.py with --context-file and nil blast-radius-map to verify AC-F4; confirms dispatch guard exists in commands/dev.md; confirms manifest.json has 12 active_tests; confirms AC6 WHEN clause updated in both artifact files

_risk_level_doc: medium: changes to agent prompts (ba.md, qa.md, dev.md, graphify.md), a Python script (graphify-enrich.py), and command files. Blast radius limited to graphify integration path. No auth, schema, or public API changes.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Round 1 (initial BA spec): Codex confirmed scope minimal; 8 PROPOSED_FIX items applied. Round 2 (QA iteration — 4 OBJ responses): Codex confirmed OBJ-1 plan incomplete (fix wording + move Should Have files section too); OBJ-2 AC-F5 patterns too weak (add section_anchor scoping, assert if-block not just variable); OBJ-3 AC-F7 grep false-pass (use jq scoped to AC6.when + AC6.check.pattern, not file-wide grep); OBJ-4 negative patterns need Run: prefix for dev.md graphify-enrich and ERE anchoring. Scope confirmed properly bounded to three BA artifacts.

findings.issue: Fix 4 must be gated on --context-file arg
findings.proposed_fix: In nil-map path of graphify-enrich.py: if args.context_file exists, call empty_graph_context(STATUS_SKIPPED, br_reason) and patch context.json; if no --context-file was provided, keep current no-context behavior
findings.rationale: Already planned; confirmed correct by Codex

findings.issue: Existing AC8 test invokes graphify-enrich.py without --context-file so context-patch gap is unverified
findings.proposed_fix: Add assertion to test_AC8 or sibling test: invoke with temp context JSON and assert graph_context.status == 'skipped' in the patched file
findings.rationale: Without this update, AC-F4 has no automated test coverage; included in AC-F4 THEN clause

findings.issue: Fix 5 post-dispatch instruction at commands/dev.md:703 must be conditional
findings.proposed_fix: Update post-dispatch check to be conditional: only read graph-summary.json if sentinel existed / dispatch was performed
findings.rationale: When sentinel absent, graph-summary.json is never written; unconditional check would fail silently

findings.proposed_fix: Update AC6 check.pattern in acceptance-criteria-20260527-132200.json to reflect prose scope
findings.rationale: Ticket and acceptance-criteria should be in sync; added to F7 files_to_modify

findings.issue: graphify.md has two decimal prose refs (line 3 YAML front-matter + line 10 body)
findings.rationale: Both locations confirmed; dev must fix both (already captured in F2 requirements)

findings.issue: AC12 test must not assert literal 'Step 1.5' / 'Step 7.5' strings
findings.rationale: AC12 test should assert semantic placement via graphify-query.py/graphify-enrich.py references; captured in AC-F6 THEN clause

findings.issue: OBJ-1 plan incomplete: 'Should Have' wording and 'Affected files (Should Have)' section remain after MoSCoW promotion
findings.proposed_fix: Update Goal section to say '5 blocking + 2 fix-required'; update MoSCoW to move F6/F7 to Must Have; update Affected files section from '(Should Have)' to '(all Must Have)'
findings.rationale: QA-iteration round 2 finding; all three changes applied to ticket MD and context JSON

findings.issue: OBJ-2 AC-F5 grep patterns: context:'lines 684-710 only' likely ignored by harness; separate GRAPHIFY_SENTINEL + if greps do not prove dispatch is actually conditional
findings.proposed_fix: Use section_anchor/section_end fields instead of hard line numbers; assert both sentinel variable assignment and if-block conditional within the Graphify enrichment section; assert conditional dispatch behavior, not just variable existence
findings.rationale: QA-iteration round 2 finding; AC-F5 check now uses section_anchor='Graphify enrichment' + section_end='### Step 8'

findings.issue: OBJ-3 AC-F7 grep check: ticket pattern 'agent.*command.*\.md' matches unrelated lines today (false-pass); acceptance-criteria 'Step.*[0-9]+\.[0-9]+' matches unfixed file (false-pass)
findings.proposed_fix: Replace with jq commands: (1) .[] | select(.id=="AC6") | .when | test("prose";"i") -> true; (2) .[] | select(.id=="AC6") | .check.pattern | test("##[+] Step") -> false; (3) section-scoped grep for 'prose' within ### AC6 block in ticket MD
findings.rationale: QA-iteration round 2 finding; AC-F7 check now uses jq type with three scoped commands

findings.issue: OBJ-4 negative patterns: ^python3 anchor works but misses 'Run: python3' line in commands/dev.md for graphify-enrich; ERE (query|enrich) alternation needs split patterns
findings.proposed_fix: Split patterns: ^[[:space:]]*python3.*graphify-query (no_match in dev.md) and ^[[:space:]]*Run:[[:space:]]*python3.*graphify-enrich (no_match in dev.md)
findings.rationale: QA-iteration round 2 finding; AC-F1 check now has 4 negative patterns with proper anchoring

findings.issue: Scope is properly bounded to the three BA artifacts
findings.rationale: Confirmed: only ticket-20260529-080709.md, context-20260529-080709.json, acceptance-criteria-20260529-080709.json are modified in this BA iteration

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Round 2 QA-iteration changes: (1) OBJ-1 — promoted F6/F7 to Must Have in Goal, MoSCoW, and Affected files sections; (2) OBJ-2 — AC-F5 check now uses section_anchor scoping and asserts both sentinel variable + if-block conditional; (3) OBJ-3 — AC-F7 check now uses jq type with three scoped assertions (when contains prose, check.pattern lacks ##[+] Step, ticket AC6 section contains prose); (4) OBJ-4 — AC-F1 check now includes 4 negative patterns with Run: prefix and ERE-safe anchoring for dev.md.
